arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea injuries, title race, 'toughest' test yet vs Southampton
arts.sum: "The good thing is that I still think what I said to the owners and the sporting directors the first time I met them; because of the age, and how good the squad is, for me Chelsea in the next five or 10 years will be one of the teams, or the team, that will dominate English football. For sure, it's a big loss because Wes was doing fantastic in every game but we need to accept we have to find a different solution."

arts.ttl: Chelsea urged to sell star named 'BEST IN THE WORLD'
arts.sum: Although Deeney has urged Chelsea to sell James in 2025, Manchester City star Kyle Walker believes the Blues club captain is the best in world football when he’s fully fit. Chelsea have been urged to “cut their losses” on Reece James following his latest injury setback.

arts.ttl: I won the Champions League with Chelsea but left for Real Madrid after call on team bus
arts.sum: At the time, Chelsea were gearing up for their UEFA Super Cup clash with Atletico Madrid, and the bus was pulling out of the hotel car park when Essien's agent phoned him to confirm that the move was happening and that he needed to get off and return to his hotel room to sort the minor details out. So when the chance to join Madrid and reunite with his former manager Jose Mourinho came up, Essien jumped at it.
